response.justification: James is a highly skilled Staff Software Engineer with an impressive track record in open-source development and system architecture. However, he lacks the executive-level leadership, formal team management, and client-facing IT consulting experience required for a Head of Development role. Additionally, his basic German proficiency falls significantly short of the mandatory C1 requirement.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience in modern software development and open-source technologies.
Strong architectural background, having built complex, high-throughput platforms and microservices.
Demonstrated passion for mentoring and knowledge sharing through workshops, courses, and dojos.
concerns: Fails to meet the mandatory C1 German language requirement (currently at Basic level).
Lacks proven executive-level leadership, operational oversight, and formal team management experience.
Missing explicit experience in enterprise IT consulting, UML modeling, and security/compliance advisory.
